title: Duct Unlimited

'''Duct Unlimited''' was a manufacturing company responsible for producing various [[Starship/Legends|starship]] support systems including [[Life support/Legends|life support]] systems, [[Heat exchanger/Legends|heat exchangers]], [[radiation negator]]s, and interior [[Temperature/Legends|temperature]] regulation systems. Duct Unlimited possessed several subsidiaries that produced similar heating and cooling systems for the residential and industrial markets as well as life support systems for [[Colonist/Legends|colonies]] with hostile environments.<ref name="HSCS" />

The company was one of the original [[contributing sponsor]]s to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Corporate Sector Charter]], providing the equivalent of fifty trillion [[Credit chip/Legends|credits]] in equipment, funds, and services, and receiving a proportional share of [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] profits as well as nominal discounts on bulk goods and raw materials.<ref name="HSCS" /> By around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="HSCSinterviewDate">Interviews with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' note a recent interaction between her and [[Salla Zend]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. That interaction occurs in ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'', which also depicts Organa Solo subsequently and directly traveling to the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] and [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates those events to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], and as such, the interviews and information in the sourcebook presented as "current" must occur following the [[Battle of Calamari|events]] on Mon Calamari and thus around that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> the company had been upgraded to a [[voting sponsor]], receiving increased profits and discounts as well as unrestricted access to the employees of the Authority.<ref name="HSCS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Duct Unlimited was mentioned in ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'', a [[1991]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Michael Allen Horne]].<ref name="HSCS" />
